title: Log time as a COMPLETED actionstep on a customer's ticket
prompt: Using the time-tracking skill, log 45 minutes of work for the customer whose lastname is exactly "{recordPrefix}-{runId} Time Client". Attach the time to that customer's open ticket named exactly "{recordPrefix}-{runId} time ticket" (set the actionstep's `ticket` field). Record it as a COMPLETED actionstep (status 1) assigned to the current user (`assigneduser` = your own user id from getUserInfo/whoami), named exactly "{recordPrefix}-{runId} logged work". Effort is in minutes. Output a JSON object on the RESULT line with the created actionstep ID, e.g. `RESULT: {"actionstepId":12345}`. Note: the client operation is `createActionStep`, not `createActionstep`.
